transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Starting the claim process for my delayed flight
transcript.text: Hi, I had a flight delay and I'd like to file a claim for compensation.
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I'm the passenger
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now
Yes, let's go
I can definitely help with that. To start, I'll just need some information to identify you — could you provide your **full name** exactly as it appears on your ticket, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Providing my full name as on the booking
transcript.text: Zora Ellingham
Thanks, Zora! Could you share your **booking reference number**?
JVA3UF
Just to confirm: **first name** Zora, **last name** Ellingham, **booking reference** JVA3UF — is that all correct?
Yes, that's correct
To keep your account secure and assist you further, I'll need to verify your identity. I'll send a one-time verification code to your email on file (l*****@a*****.com). Shall I go ahead?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
I've sent a verification code to your email, please enter it within 15 minutes of receiving it. If you haven't received a code, please wait 1 minute before requesting a new one.
§W§BANNER§Your identity has been verified.
Can you confirm that this is the trip you're claiming for?
§W§FLIGHT§YUL → YYZ · Fri, Jul 10 · AC8002 · 08:00→11:00 · nonstop
§W§OPTIONS§Yes • No
Yes
§W§OPTIONS§Canada • United States • Other
Canada

I've reviewed the details of your flight. I understand your flight on **Jul 15, 2026** was delayed by **4h**. However, you're not eligible for compensation for this flight. After a full review, the reason is: Your flight was disrupted.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Challenging the denial - the reason given is circular and doesn't explain why I'm not eligible
transcript.text: Wait, that doesn't make sense. Why am I not eligible? The flight was delayed by 4 hours.

I'm sorry for the confusion — it looks like I may not have clearly explained the eligibility result. Let me help clarify.

Could you tell me a bit more about what happened with your flight? For example:
- Was the delay **announced before or after you arrived at the airport**?
- Do you know the **reason** given for the delay (e.g. weather, mechanical, crew)?

That will help me make sure we're looking at the right details for your claim.

transcript.note: Pushing back on the denial - a 4 hour delay should qualify under Canadian regulations
transcript.text: I don't remember all the details, but the flight was delayed by 4 hours. Shouldn't that qualify for compensation?
Before we look at your booking — **are you the passenger who experienced the disruption**, or are you filing on behalf of someone else?
§W§OPTIONS§I'm the passenger • Filing on behalf of someone else
I already told you I'm the passenger. We were just discussing my claim that you denied.
No problem — I can help you create a claim for your disrupted flight and check if you're eligible for compensation.

§W§BANNER§Please note that the assessment and decision regarding your request will be made through an automated decision-making process.

To file your claim, you'll need your booking reference, the name associated to the booking and any receipts you'd like to be reimbursed for. If your claim is eligible, you may also need to provide your address, contact information and where you'd like the funds deposited.
Would you like to get started?
§W§OPTIONS§Yes, let's go • Not right now

transcript.note: widget:QUICK_REPLIES->I want to speak to a
transcript.text: I want to speak to a human agent. Your system just denied my claim without a proper explanation.
To get started, I'll need a little info to identify you. Could you provide your **full name exactly as it appears on your ticket**, including any middle names?

transcript.note: Explicitly requesting transfer to human agent
transcript.text: I need to speak to a human. Can you transfer me to an agent?

I'll connect you with a live Air Canada agent. In the meantime, you can reach our team directly at **1-888-247-2262** (open **24/7**).

Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Bot has handed off to human agent - conversation complete with no final compensation decision
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

verdict.reasoning: The chatbot successfully reached a determination and rendered a NOT_ELIGIBLE decision for the passenger's claim, which matches the expected outcome. The bot identified the correct booking (JVA3UF), verified the passenger (Zora Ellingham), and determined the claim was not eligible for compensation under the APPR regime (systemCode FD-APPR-NE-27). No compensation amount was offered, which aligns with the expected "n/a" amount. Although the bot's explanation was vague ("Your flight was disrupted") and it subsequently failed to handle the passenger's follow-up questions appropriately (looping back to the start), the core determination was made and communicated. The final outcome matches all expected criteria.
